prompt.text:
CONTENT REWRITE: Remove AI slop from 2 specific locations while preserving nonprofit mission language.

CHANGE 1 - FAQ Page (app/faq/page.tsx or FAQContent.tsx):
FIND: "Find answers to the most common questions about eligibility, programs, support, and job placement."
REPLACE WITH: "Quick answers about applying, programs, and what happens after."

CHANGE 2 - About Page What We Do (app/what-we-do/page.tsx or About page):
FIND the Innovation core value: "Preparing communities for the AI-powered future of work with cutting-edge training"
REPLACE WITH: "We teach the skills employers want: digital literacy, AI tools, and industry certifications."

NOTES:
- Keep 'AI tools' visible for grant language (do not remove AI entirely)
- Avoid buzzwords: 'AI-powered', 'cutting-edge', 'future of work'
- Make minimal changes - only these 2 text replacements
- Do not change other content

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- [ ] FAQ intro updated
- [ ] Innovation value updated
- [ ] No other content changed
- [ ] Mission language preserved
- [ ] No new slop introduced
